subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, O assured leaf! Though thy honoured presence hath been absent and withdrawn for a time, God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ای ورقه موقنه جناب معلوم هر چند مدتی غائب و غارب بودند انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @humor; jokes, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
